channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Check out @chatpileband.bsky.social's new single "PEN I S MA…

item.description: Check out @chatpileband.bsky.social's new single "PEN I S MALL," an extremely heavy song with an excellent video

item.title: Hear Ted Leo guest on "Human Nature," the lead single from N…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Hear Ted Leo guest on "Human Nature," the lead single from NYC ska band Be Decent's new album
item.content:encoded: Hear Ted Leo guest on "Human Nature," the lead single from NYC ska band Be Decent's new album

item.title: Heat waves are becoming more common and intense as a result …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Heat waves are becoming more common and intense as a result of climate change — and roads are suffering as a result. Are the nation's roads up to meeting the challenge of a warmer, wetter future?
item.content:encoded: Heat waves are becoming more common and intense as a result of climate change — and roads are suffering as a result. Are the nation's roads up to meeting the challenge of a warmer, wetter future?

item.title: The number of tracks with explicit lyrics featured in Spotif…
item.author: Mixmag (@mixmag.net)
item.description: The number of tracks with explicit lyrics featured in Spotify's Top 50 has reduced by 61% since 2018, a new report has found
item.content:encoded: The number of tracks with explicit lyrics featured in Spotify's Top 50 has reduced by 61% since 2018, a new report has found

item.title: The strain of the virus that's responsible for the current o…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The strain of the virus that's responsible for the current outbreak has no specific treatments or preventive measures. Three new clinical trials could provide possible breakthroughs. n.pr/4wpaU4Y
item.content:encoded: The strain of the virus that's responsible for the current outbreak has no specific treatments or preventive measures. Three new clinical trials could provide possible breakthroughs. n.pr/4wpaU4Y

item.title: Hendrix’s model would be Cynthia Albritton’s most famous and…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Hendrix’s model would be Cynthia Albritton’s most famous and set the tone for a career that would earn her cult status, from references in Jim Croce’s 1972 song “Five Short Minutes” to the 1977 Kiss single “Plaster Caster” to the 2024 film Drive-Away Dolls.

🔗 www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
Hendrix’s model would be Cynthia Albritton’s most famous and set the tone for a career that would earn her cult status, from references in Jim Croce’s 1972 song “Five Short Minutes” to the 1977 Kiss single “Plaster Caster” to the 2024 film Drive-Away Dolls.

🔗 www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: Cynthia Albritton’s friends gave her collection — casts, dia…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Cynthia Albritton’s friends gave her collection — casts, diaries, and penis-themed tchotchkes she collected — to the Kinsey Institute. “The [diaries] almost read like fan fiction, like erotica, except it’s real," curator Rebecca Fasman says.

Story: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
Cynthia Albritton’s friends gave her collection — casts, diaries, and penis-themed tchotchkes she collected — to the Kinsey Institute. “The [diaries] almost read like fan fiction, like erotica, except it’s real," curator Rebecca Fasman says.

Story: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: In the early 2000s, Cynthia Albritton branched into breasts,…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
In the early 2000s, Cynthia Albritton branched into breasts, capturing L7’s Suzie Gardner, Peaches, and Karen O of Yeah Yeah Yeahs.

“Boobs don’t push back like an erect cock does,” notes Sally Timms of the Mekons, whose chest Albritton casted.

More: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
In the early 2000s, Cynthia Albritton branched into breasts, capturing L7’s Suzie Gardner, Peaches, and Karen O of Yeah Yeah Yeahs.

“Boobs don’t push back like an erect cock does,” notes Sally Timms of the Mekons, whose chest Albritton casted.

More: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: Cynthia Albritton befriended Frank Zappa, although he declin…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Cynthia Albritton befriended Frank Zappa, although he declined her offer to cast him.

“He was intelligent, respectful, and very curious, and he seemed interested in my idea about having a rock-cock museum," Albritton said.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
Cynthia Albritton befriended Frank Zappa, although he declined her offer to cast him.

“He was intelligent, respectful, and very curious, and he seemed interested in my idea about having a rock-cock museum," Albritton said.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: July's crop of notable releases features new work from Colso…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: July's crop of notable releases features new work from Colson Whitehead, Sigrid Nuñez, Daniel Mason and Nathaniel Rich. Plus, new nonfiction from award-winning journalists. n.pr/3SD4px3
item.content:encoded: July's crop of notable releases features new work from Colson Whitehead, Sigrid Nuñez, Daniel Mason and Nathaniel Rich. Plus, new nonfiction from award-winning journalists. n.pr/3SD4px3

item.title: 【ライブレポ】 Adoが7万人の前で誓った“歌い手”としての覚悟 まふまふやオーケストラもサプライズ登場した …
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
【ライブレポ】
Adoが7万人の前で誓った“歌い手”としての覚悟

まふまふやオーケストラもサプライズ登場した
日産スタジアム公演を徹底レポート！

🔽詳しくはこちら（写真15枚）
https://natalie.mu/music/news/679763?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

「それで皆さんを救うことができるなら、私はまだAdoとして歌い続けたい」

#Ado_Ao
item.content:encoded:
【ライブレポ】
Adoが7万人の前で誓った“歌い手”としての覚悟

まふまふやオーケストラもサプライズ登場した
日産スタジアム公演を徹底レポート！

item.title: Over decades, Cynthia Albritton casted dozens of men. Here a…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Over decades, Cynthia Albritton casted dozens of men. Here are some highlights, including Jimi Hendrix and his bassist, Noel Redding.

More: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
Over decades, Cynthia Albritton casted dozens of men. Here are some highlights, including Jimi Hendrix and his bassist, Noel Redding.

More: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: By the time Cynthia Albritton’s career as an artist came to …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
By the time Cynthia Albritton’s career as an artist came to an end, she would have roughly 60 casts — plus 10 sets of breasts she made of female musicians.

“These things aren’t just pieces of plaster to me — they’re like my children.”

Story: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
By the time Cynthia Albritton’s career as an artist came to an end, she would have roughly 60 casts — plus 10 sets of breasts she made of female musicians.

“These things aren’t just pieces of plaster to me — they’re like my children.”

Story: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: The plan was simple: Get the subject erect, have him thrust …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
The plan was simple: Get the subject erect, have him thrust into the alginates, then when the mold was clear, fill it with plaster to make the cast.

“We are the Plaster Casters, and we want to plaster cast your Hampton Wick,” their calling card read.

🔗 www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
The plan was simple: Get the subject erect, have him thrust into the alginates, then when the mold was clear, fill it with plaster to make the cast.

“We are the Plaster Casters, and we want to plaster cast your Hampton Wick,” their calling card read.

🔗 www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: The Legend of Cynthia Plaster Caster She was famous for her…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
The Legend of Cynthia Plaster Caster

She was famous for her statues of rock stars’ penises, but this groupie’s entire story has never been told — until now.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
The Legend of Cynthia Plaster Caster

She was famous for her statues of rock stars’ penises, but this groupie’s entire story has never been told — until now.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: Graham Platner is facing calls to end his bid for U.S. Senat…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Graham Platner is facing calls to end his bid for U.S. Senate in Maine after a woman accused him of sexual assault. And, Trump made his dissatisfaction with NATO clear ahead of its summit this week. n.pr/4f1G3oa
item.content:encoded: Graham Platner is facing calls to end his bid for U.S. Senate in Maine after a woman accused him of sexual assault. And, Trump made his dissatisfaction with NATO clear ahead of its summit this week. n.pr/4f1G3oa

item.title: Remember Project 2025? Democrats are building their own gove…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Remember Project 2025? Democrats are building their own governing blueprint, and one proposal takes aim at the "annoyance economy": robocalls, endless hold times, hidden fees and other everyday frustrations. n.pr/3R2ZN2G
item.content:encoded: Remember Project 2025? Democrats are building their own governing blueprint, and one proposal takes aim at the "annoyance economy": robocalls, endless hold times, hidden fees and other everyday frustrations. n.pr/3R2ZN2G

item.title: Philadelphia's Kensington neighborhood is known for street d…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Philadelphia's Kensington neighborhood is known for street drugs and crime. A local soccer club is offering local kids pride and a safe place to play and compete. n.pr/4eQg0l2
item.content:encoded: Philadelphia's Kensington neighborhood is known for street drugs and crime. A local soccer club is offering local kids pride and a safe place to play and compete. n.pr/4eQg0l2
